title: WATERSY Travel Mug Coffee Cup 40oz Tumbler Straw Lid and Handle, Stainless Steel Double Wall Vacuum Insulated Coffee Water Bottle Thermal for Cold Hot Coffee 1182ml Rose Quartz
features: 【Easy to Carry】The water bottle can be easily placed in the car cup holder, and the one-handle design allows you to easily take out the tumbler and drink and to carry their favorite beverages wherever they go. The wide opening design makes cleaning more convenient and easier

【Keep Drinks Temperature】The large capacity thermal coffee cup adopts vacuum insulation technology, which can provide good heat preservation effect for your drinks. Hot or cold, our mug provides excellent insulation for your favorite beverages

【Leak-proof Design】 The travel cup feature a well-sealed lid, effectively preventing drink leakage or spills for convenient portability and travel. The lid is designed with drinking holes for placing straws or drinking directly

【Premium Material】The travel mug tumbler is made of high quality 304 stainless steel, which is durable, rust-proof, heat-retaining and easy to clean and helps reduce the use of disposable plastic cups, contributing to environmental conservation and energy efficiency

【Large capacity】The thermal mug is 27.5 cm high, 10 cm long and 10 cm wide. 1182ml can well meet your drinking water needs while driving. Suitable for camping, sports, travel, road trips, BBQ, parties and more. You can share them as gifts with your family, friends, teachers, colleagues on birthdays, Thanksgiving and Christmas
